'''Va'art''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Va'art system/Legends|Va'art system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was orbited by a jungle [[Moon/Legends|moon]] known as the [[Jungle moon of Va'art]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'' {{Mo}}
